creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
No, I don't have installed the flashplugin. The only plugin I had installed (beside the default available plugins) was Firebug. And this was at v1.5 and could not be updated because of the Firefox issue with https connections.
So right now I removed the Firebug plugin, and now Firefox is working without issues. But the processes are still there, even when I close Firefox. The only difference is, that Firefox doesn't say anything after I closed it and start it again.
But because of the processes are still there after closing Firefox, this PR can not be closed yet.

Regards,
Hardy
-- 
GRATIS für alle GMX-Mitglieder: Die maxdome Movie-FLAT!
Jetzt freischalten unter http://portal.gmx.net/de/go/maxdome01
